Events

Charlottesville and Albemarle County host a variety of visitor-friendly events throughout the year, bringing people together to celebrate food, drinks, music, art, culture, history, the outdoors and more.

Pippin Hill Farm & Vineyards Cooking Class
Credit: Sera Petras Photography

Annual Signature Events

Explore these standing signature events in Charlottesville and Albemarle County, from the Virginia Festival of the Book and Virginia Film Festival to Foxfield Races and Juneteenth celebrations.

Winter

  • Winter Wander at Boar's Head Resort | Nov 14th - Jan 3rd
  • Veritas Illuminated | Nov 24th - Jan 3rd
  • Magic on the Mall | Nov 15th - Jan 11th
  • UVA Lighting of the Lawn | Dec 5th
  • Charlottesville Grand Illumination | Dec 5th
  • Crozet Winter Brews Festival | Dec 6th
  • Wool Factory Wine Festival | Jan 24th
  • Charlottesville Restaurant Week | Jan 26th - Feb 1st

Spring 2026

  • Banff Centre Mountain Film Festival | March 6th - 8th
  • Cville Puzzle Hunt | March 14th
  • Virginia Festival of the Book | March 20th - 22nd
  • Indie Short Film Festival | March 20th - 22nd
  • Charlottesville 10 Miler | March 28th
  • Charlottesville Marathon & Half Marathon | April 11th
  • Tom Tom Festival | April 22nd - 26th
  • Historic Garden Week | April 19th
  • National Park Week | TBA
  • Foxfield Races | April 25th
  • Rivanna Roots Concert Series | TBA
  • VeryAsian VA Celebration | TBA
  • Rivanna Riverfest | TBA
  • Crozet Arts & Crafts Festival | May 9th - 10th
  • Scottsville Fridays on the Canal | Every Fourth Friday Starting TBA
  • Charlottesville Arts Festival | TBA
  • King Family Polo Series | Every Sunday Starting May 24th
  • Pints on Preston | TBA

Summer 2026

  • Charlottesville Opera FestivALL | TBA
  • Monticello Wine Week | TBA
  • Know Good Beer & Bourbon Festival | TBA
  • Rivanna Roots Concert Series
  • James River Batteau Festival in Scottsville | TBA
  • Juneteenth Celebrations
  • Charlottesville Opera | TBA
  • Virginia Theatre Festival | TBA
  • Scottsville Fridays on the Canal | TBA
  • Fae Festival | TBA
  • Downtown Mall's 50th Anniversary Celebration | July 3rd
  • Monticello Naturalization Ceremony | July 4th
  • Charlottesville Restaurant Week | TBA
  • King Family Polo Series | TBA
  • Charlottesville Opera | TBA
  • Veritas Starry Nights Music Festival | TBA
  • Chihamba AA Cultural Arts Festival | TBA
  • Woolly Bully Beer Fest | TBA
  • Albemarle County Fair | July 30th - Aug 1st
  • Soul of Cville | Aug 15th - 22nd
  • Walk Our City Crawl | TBA
  • Night Sky Festival | TBA
  • Charlottesville Women's 4 Miler | Labor Day Weekend

Fall 2026

  • Maupintown Film Festival | TBA
  • Cville Pride Festival | Sept TBA
  • Charlottesville Chamber Music Festival | Sept TBA
  • Cville VegFest | Sept TBA
  • Cville Sabroso Festival | Sept TBA
  • Loop de'Ville Festival | Sept 27th
  • Rivanna Roots Concert Series | Oct 4th & 18th
  • Foxfield Races | Oct 4th
  • Crozet Arts & Crafts Festival | Oct 10th - 11th
  • Virginia Film Festival | Oct 22nd - 26th
  • Fantasy Fest | October TBA
  • Artisans Studio Tour | Nov TBA
  • Two Up, Wine Down Festival | Nov TBA

Browse the event calendar below to see what’s happening!
